reason: Escalating geopolitical tensions, particularly the Iran escalation, are driving significant risk-off sentiment across global markets. Oil prices have surged dramatically, impacting traditional stocks and increasing the odds of a U.S. market meltdown. Bitcoin, after an initial period of relative stability, has tumbled below key support levels ($66,000) with forecasts pointing to deeper downside potential. The broader sentiment indicates a shift away from a speculative 'Rock ’n’ Roll Era' towards a more cautious, risk-averse market environment for crypto.
headlines: Bitcoin could face deeper downside as odds of U.S. market meltdown rise to 35%
Oil shorts on Hyperliquid get wiped out as crude surges 30% on Iran escalation
Oil futures surge 20% past $110 as war fears hammer Asian stocks, bitcoin steady near $67K
Bitcoin tumbles below $66,000 as oil prices explode nearly 20% higher
Crypto’s Rock ’n’ Roll Era Is Over
